name: ANDLOG_f
description: AND logic gate with 2 control inputs (event triggered)

  <ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="0" width="0"/>

anomalies: Has 2 ControlPort inputs and 1 ExplicitOutput (reverse of typical data flow)
Used inside SuperBlocks for conditional logic
Larger than standard: 60x60 to accommodate AND symbol
criticalRules: Logic gate with 2 control inputs (event triggers)
